---
title: "Contacts"
---

## Get in touch

*I'm always open to discussing data projects,problems,*

*research opportunities, or collaborations.*

*I would be glad to hear from you.*

*Feel free to reach out through any of platforms below.*

**Send me an email**

*Email*:[mbithialexander146\@gmail.com](mbithialexander146@gmail.com)

**Connect with me on Linkedln**

*Linkedin*:[open](linkedin/in/aleix-mbithi-b5a88321b)

**Explore my projects**

Posit:[View](https://posit.cloud/content/Alex-Mbithi)

Rpubs:[open](https://rpubs.com/Drool_bee)

*Github*:[open](github.com/mbithi%20alexander146-jpg)

`Looking forward to connecting with you`
